creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
jigdo-lite binary needs 'wget' to perform the downloads.
	ftp/wget needs to be a run dependency; however, it doesn't
	need to be present during build.

Fix: Run-depend on ftp/wget instead of build-depend.
How-To-Repeat: 	Launch "jigdo-lite" and attempt to download something.
